name: Vanguard
xp_description: Gain 1 XP every time your Battalion’s damage successfully overflows into an opposing Back Line during the Siege Phase.

levels.name: Marching Orders
levels.description: Siege passive: Your Front Line units gain +1 Might while attacking a Battlefield you do not control.

levels.name: Relentless Push
levels.description: Once per Siege phase, you may pay 1 Ore or 1 Materia. Choose one of your Front Line Units; it gains +2 Might until the end of the phase.

levels.name: Total Conquest
levels.description: Once per game, when you successfully claim a Battlefield, you may immediately force your opponent to Fell one of their Units that survived on a different Battlefield before it can return to their Barracks.
